one_time_description: Revenue from trust fund of $5,699,394 in 2023 vs $2,357 in 2022 - likely a significant trust fund distribution or settlement
economic_notes: Economic development revenue of $238,669 reported in 2023. Hydro One revenue of $12,346. OFNLP revenue of $1,075,192. Government business enterprises and partnerships valued at $8,667,606.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to investments in government business enterprises, government partnerships, and other government organizations (Note 5) where financial information has not been audited and summary financial information not provided as required by Canadian public sector accounting standards. Auditor unable to determine if adjustments necessary to financial assets, other income/expenses, operating surplus and accumulated surplus. Prior year 2022 statements were audited by BDO Canada LLP before its merger with MNP LLP. Large trust fund revenue of $5,699,394 in 2023 vs $2,357 in 2022 is highly unusual. Accumulated remeasurement losses of $546,681 on portfolio investments in 2023. Deferred revenue increased significantly from $4,663,689 to $11,954,013. Long-term debt decreased from $2,907,448 to $922,993 due to repayments of $1,984,455. Tangible capital assets under construction of $4,008,789.
